name: Multi-Screen for Arizer Desktop Vaporizers
summary: Multi-Screen for Arizer Desktop Vaporisers — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: This Mesh Screen pack is designed specifically for use with the Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower Vaporisers, and includes two circular screens for the cyclone bowl and two domed screens for the glass elbow adapter. These screens are expertly crafted to ensure optimal vaporisation and are a necessary addition to enhance your vaping experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
